name: Pasta with Asparagus and Shrimp

ingredients.item: + 3 tbsp. olive or saffron oil, divided
large red bell pepper or roasted peppers

method: Cook pasta according to package directions; drain and coat with 3 tbsp. olive oil.
Steam asparagus; reserve 3 tbsp. of the water. Use remaining asparagus water to steam shrimp 3 to 5 minutes.
Whisk reserved 3 tbsp. water, lemon zest, lemon juice, garlic, parsley, pepper, salt and mustard with 1/3 cup olive
oil or saffron oil. Toss together linguine, shrimp, asparagus, peppers and olives with lemon juice mixture.
Scallops and shrimp are a delicious combination of texture and flavor that make for a wonderfully elegant dish. A
healthy, delicious seafood dish made with linguine. Scallops and shrimp are sautéed in garlic and herbs before
being added to a sauce of white wine, tomatoes, lemon juice, crunchy pecans, and celery. This recipe is perfect for a
weeknight meal or dinner party appetizer!
